zh.lifeSummary: 當John Marshal於1257年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍可林時，他的父親William Marshal43歲，母親Elizabeth de Ferrers17歲。他於1274年與Hawise de Saye在英國諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年12月4日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可辛加姆享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Marshal于1257年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍可林时，他的父亲William Marshal43岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ferrers17岁。他于1274年与Hawise de Saye在英国諾福爾可辛加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年12月4日在英国英格兰諾福爾可辛加姆享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Marshal was born in 1257, in Hockering, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Marshal, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth de Ferrers, was 17. He married Hawise de Saye in 1274, in Hingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 December 1282, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Marshal est né en 1257, à Hockering, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Marshal, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ferrers, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Saye en 1274, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1282, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Marshal 1257 in Hockering, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Marshal 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Ferrers 17. Er hat 1274 in Hingham, Norfolk, England Hawise de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1282 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Marshal è nato il nel 1257 nel Hockering, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Marshal, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Ferrers, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Saye nel 1274, nel Hingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1282, nel Hingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Marshalが1257年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホーッカーイングで生まれた時，父William Marshalは43歳，母Elizabeth de Ferrersは17歳であった。1274年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでHawise de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年12月4日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Marshal(이)가 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호커잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Marshal(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ferrers(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1274년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 Hawise de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 12월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Marshal nasceu em 1257, em Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Marshal, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Saye em 1274, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1282, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Marshal родился в 1257 г. в местности хоккиринг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Marshal было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ferrers, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Saye в 1274 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 декабря 1282 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Marshal nació en 1257, en Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Marshal, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Hawise de Saye en 1274, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1282, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años.
